title: Ordivon Verify Trust Report
description: JSON trust report output from Ordivon Verify. Produced by --json flag. Status const is evidence, NOT execution authority. Prototype artifact — not a public release contract.

schema_version.description: Schema version of the report format.

status.description: Overall trust status. READY: selected checks passed (not authorization). BLOCKED: hard failure detected. DEGRADED: no hard failures but governance incomplete. NEEDS_REVIEW: advisory concerns require human review.

root.description: Absolute path to the project root being verified.

config.description: Path to the config file used, or null for native mode.

hard_failures.description: Detailed failure objects from receipt scanning.

warnings.description: Warning objects for checks not configured or in advisory mode.

disclaimer.const: READY means selected checks passed; it does not authorize execution.
disclaimer.description: Immutable disclaimer. Must appear in every trust report.
